message:
You know that feeling when the weather report hints at a storm, and you just can’t help but feel a little smug if you’ve prepped ahead? Last winter, we had a pretty hefty snowstorm predicted, and I was ready. I had our pantry stocked, flashlights charged, and blankets piled high on the couch—just in case. My friends were joking about how I was overreacting, but when the snow started pouring down and they were scrambling for supplies, I couldn’t help but smile a little. It felt great to be ready and cozy while the world outside turned white. 

While I definitely don’t want anyone to be caught off guard, it’s nice to have that peace of mind. Staying prepared can turn any weather worry into a cozy adventure at home! Have you ever had a 'I told you so' moment with weather prep? 🌨️
